name: Tropical Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the white sugar, brown sugar, shortening, and egg until well combined.
2. Stir in the crushed pineapple, oatmeal, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, nuts, flour, and baking soda.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto an ungreased baking sheet.
4. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
4. Allow to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before removing them from the sheet.
